ab: Usau, mahimuha ku ku cingpi, aimaka pakisalru su nakuwa?
ch: W:Usau，我忘了帶筆，你可以借我嗎?
en: Usau, I forgot to bring my pen. Can you lend me one?

ab: miyalriya ku kai iluku, yaki Muni kaivai.
en: I don’t have one either. This is Muni’s.

ab: aimaka pakisalru su nakuwa padalru? aisaha saulriya ku musuwa.
ch: W:那可以借我一下子嗎?我很快就還你。
en: Can you lend me the pen for a second? I will return to you immediately.

ab: eene, malraa.
en: Sure, take it.

ab: maelanenga, taku kyaseasenanga ki Muni.
en: Thank you and thank Muni for me.

ab: manema ku muhikai su?
en: May I help you?

ab: aisaulriya ku ikai drusa ka hungu.
en: I want to return these two books.

ab: eene, manemaneana ku muhikai su?
en: No problem and what else do you need?

ab: aikisalruwanana ku ikai tulru ka hungu.
en: I would like to borrow these three books.

ab: eene, ngulringava swaulri lu makatulrulunga ku vai.
ch: A:好了，記得三天後要拿來還。
en: Sure and remember to return them after three days.

ab: kadruwa su ka wasaulriyana nakuwa idra sasupisupilra.
en: You haven’t returned me the eraser.

ab: wasaulringana ku kudhaa.
en: I returned it yesterday.

ab: lani kawlrau kudra sasupisupilrane li.
ch: M:那我的橡皮擦怎麼不見了。
en: Then, why is my eraser missing?

ab: lasi pakisalru su ki Usau?
en: Did you lend it to Usau?

ab: kiyau, nau kitubulrwana iniya.
en: I don’t know. I will go and ask her.

ab: nau pakisalruwana musuwa ikai sasupisupilrane li.
en: I will lend you my eraser first.

ab: Muni, kaivai ebele pakisalru musawa ki Usau?
en: Muni, did Usau lend you this coat?

ab: ini, langai ki ina bwaai nakuwa.
ch: W:不是，這是我媽媽買給我的
en: No, my mom bought it for me.

ab: kudra ebele ki Usau mahahamau inya yasu.
en: Usau’s coat is the same as yours.

ab: icecelrenge kudra ebele ini, makakaela ku kulau.
ch: W:他的外套是黑色的，我們的顏色不一樣。
en: His coat is black, so our colors are different.

ab: Muni, kyasalru su ki Usau ku paisu?
en: Muni, did you borrow money from Usau?

ab: eene, nau saulri kaiasaa amiya ku, mahimuha ku kai iluku ku paisu.
ch: W:有，我本來今天要還他，我忘記帶錢了。
en: Yes, I was supposed to return to him today, but I forgot to bring the money.

ab: lai saulri su luiga?
en: Then, when will you return the money?

ab: aisaulriya ku ludhaa.
en: I will return to him tomorrow.

ab: eene, nau palribulunga musuwa pelaela ki Usau.
en: Okay, I will tell Usau for you.
